description: As a Fire Climatologist at the Australian Bureau of Meteorology, document the Australian seasonal precipitation reversal for a fire meteorology briefing. Using NASA Panoply and the surface precipitation data in ~/PanoplyData/, compare the precipitation regimes for January and August over the Australian continent. Deduce the fire seasons for Northern and Southern Australia based on the driest periods and record your analysis in the briefing document at ~/Desktop/bushfire_seasonality_brief.txt.

metadata.industry: Australian Bureau of Meteorology / Rural Fire Service
